name: gleif
title: GLEIF — Legal Entity Identifiers
description: The Global Legal Entity Identifier Foundation's public register of legal entities — every entity with its 20-character LEI, legal name, country, jurisdiction and registration status.

lei.description: The 20-character ISO 17442 Legal Entity Identifier — the entity's globally unique key in the GLEIF register.

legal_name.description: The entity's official legal name, as recorded in the GLEIF golden copy.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 country code of the entity's legal address.

city.description: City of the entity's legal address.

jurisdiction.description: ISO 3166 code of the legal jurisdiction under which the entity is constituted.

legal_form.description: ELF (Entity Legal Form) code classifying the entity's legal form.

entity_status.description: Whether the entity is operational (ACTIVE) or not, per the GLEIF register.

registration_status.description: LEI registration lifecycle status (e.g. ISSUED, LAPSED, RETIRED).

initial_registration.description: Date the LEI was first registered (calendar date sliced from the golden-copy timestamp).

next_renewal.description: Date the LEI registration is next due for renewal.

corpus.description: Lowercased, accent-stripped concatenation of legal name + city + country — a derived free-text search field, not a source attribute.
